source.business_scenario: UNION + ORDER BY 触发两层 sort
source.redaction_notes: Synthetic Pagila schema; no real customer data

input.sql:
SELECT rental_id, customer_id FROM rental WHERE staff_id = 1
UNION ALL
SELECT rental_id, customer_id FROM rental WHERE staff_id = 2
ORDER BY 1, 2
